mapper.select: SELECT 'jobCompetencyAssessment' AS title ,'/JobCompetencyAssessment' AS route ,'jobCompetencyAssessmentDesc' AS description , case when jobCompetencyAssessment.exist then 'Y' else 'N' end as activeYn FROM ( SELECT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM esg.tb_job_competency_assessment tjca WHERE tjca.comp_id = #{compId} AND tjca.write_year = #{searchText} ) as exist ) AS jobCompetencyAssessment UNION ALL SELECT 'annualSAndHTrainingPlan' AS title ,'/AnnualSAndHTrainingPlan' AS route ,'annualSAndHTrainingPlanDesc' AS description , CASE WHEN annualSAndHTrainingPlan.exist THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS activeYn FROM ( SELECT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM esg.tb_approval_info tai LEFT JOIN esg.tb_training_plan_annual trpa ON tai.target_type = 'ATP' AND tai.target_id = trpa.write_year || trpa.comp_id WHERE trpa.comp_id = #{compId} AND trpa.write_year = #{searchText} AND trpa.use_yn = 'Y' AND tai.target_type = 'ATP' AND tai.param = 'approver' AND tai.signature is not null ) as exist ) AS annualSAndHTrainingPlan UNION ALL SELECT 'sAndHTrainingImplPlan' AS title ,'/SAndHTrainingImplPlan' AS route ,'sAndHTrainingImplPlanDesc' AS description , CASE WHEN sAndHTrainingImplPlan.exist THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS activeYn FROM ( SELECT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM esg.tb_approval_info tai left join esg.tb_training_plan_implementation taco on tai.target_type = 'TPI' and tai.param = 'approver'-- 추후 수정 필요 (확인자 서명 여부를 위해) and tai.target_id = taco.write_year || taco.doc_no WHERE taco.comp_id = #{compId} AND taco.write_year = #{searchText} AND taco.use_yn = 'Y' ) as exist ) AS sAndHTrainingImplPlan UNION ALL SELECT 'sAndHTrainingResultsPlan' AS title ,'/SAndHTrainingResultsPlan' AS route ,'sAndHTrainingResultsPlanDesc' AS description , CASE WHEN sAndHTrainingResultsPlan.exist THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS activeYn FROM ( SELECT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM esg.tb_approval_info tai inner join esg.tb_training_result_report taco on tai.target_type = 'TRR' and tai.param = 'approver'-- 추후 수정 필요 (확인자 서명 여부를 위해) and tai.target_id = taco.write_year || taco.doc_no WHERE taco.comp_id = #{compId} AND taco.write_year = #{searchText} AND taco.use_yn = 'Y' ) as exist ) AS sAndHTrainingResultsPlan UNION ALL SELECT 'educationStatus' AS title ,'/EducationStatus' AS route ,'educationStatusDesc' AS description , CASE WHEN educationStatus.exist THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS activeYn FROM ( SELECT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM esg.tb_training_result_report ttrr WHERE ttrr.comp_id = #{compId} AND ttrr.write_year = #{searchText} AND ttrr.use_yn = 'Y' ) as exist ) AS educationStatus
